title: 2026 Oscar Predictions: Best Supporting Actress
text: Gold Derby has compiled predictions for the Best Supporting Actress category based on combined forecasts from industry experts, award-season editors, and top-performing users for the 98th Academy Awards ceremony on March 15, 2026. Top contenders with odds: Amy Madigan (Weapons) at 41.85%, Teyana Taylor (One Battle After Another) at 34.17%, Wunmi Mosaku (Sinners) at 21.93%. Elle Fanning and Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas from Sentimental Value have much lower odds at 1.69% and 0.37% respectively. Amy Madigan's prior Oscar history includes one nomination for Twice in a Lifetime in 1985. Teyana Taylor and Wunmi Mosaku are both first-time Oscar nominees. Gold Derby analysis suggests these are historic candidate years with potential for unprecedented achievements in the Best Supporting Actress category.
